'''The Rig''' was a [[Space station/Legends|space station]] located within a remote [[Asteroid field/Legends|asteroid field]] in the [[Stenness Node|Stennes Node]].<ref name="SWR:SOF" /> The station was a highly modified [[Core Galaxy Systems Dreadnaught]].<ref name="TOTJC" />

==History==
[[File:Masters-therig.jpg|thumb|left|150px|[[Jedi Master/Legends|Masters]] [[Kit Fisto/Legends|Fisto]], [[Agen Kolar/Legends|Kolar]], [[Mace Windu/Legends|Windu]] and [[Saesee Tiin/Legends|Tiin]] [[Mission to the Rig|assault]] the Rig.]]

The Rig was taken over by the [[Crimson Nova]] chapter of the [[Bounty Hunters' Guild/Legends|Bounty Hunters' Guild]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], and provided a safe haven for [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]] and [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenaries]] from across [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. Its prisoner storage facility was called the "[[Redemption Center]]."<ref name="SWR:SOF" />

When [[Kh'aris Fenn]] issued bounties for [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knights]], [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]] led a strike team to [[Mission to the Rig|disable operations]] on the Rig. [[Kit Fisto/Legends|Kit Fisto]] incited riots among the prisoners held hostage on the station, while [[Saesee Tiin/Legends|Saesee Tiin]] caused a large explosion in the main hangar that also destroyed much of the station's supplies.<ref name="SWR:SOF" />

Finally, the Jedi led an assault on [[Nest (command center)|The Nest]], the Rig's central command center, and saw to the downfall of [[Mika (Farghul)|Mika]] and her bodyguard [[Harll]].<ref name="SWR:SOF" />
